tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_67C8F63A9C630F10ADA5F9A62A92F18C"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[7:18 am, 6/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Correct Answer: C. df.head()</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">df.head() returns the first 5 rows of a DataFrame by default. This is useful when you want to quickly inspect the structure and content of your dataset.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Here's what the other options do:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">df.tail() – returns the last 5 rows of the DataFrame.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">df.describe() – provides summary statistics (like mean, std, min, max) for numerical columns.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- "><a dir="auto" href="http://df.info" title="http://df.info" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">df.info</a>() – gives a concise summary of the DataFrame, including column names, data types, and non-null counts.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq">Buy at 1 (Day 2), Sell at 8 (Day 7)

tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_12C87AECB0E1D0FEAB721C5CB5BEDFD5"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[2:11 pm, 7/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Correct Answer: B. 4</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">We are allowed to make multiple transactions (buy-sell-buy-sell...), but we can only hold one stock at a time.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Given prices = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">We can buy at a lower price and sell at a higher price the next day as many times as we want.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Here’s how:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Buy at 1, sell at 2 → profit = 1
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Buy at 2, sell at 3 → profit = 1
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Buy at 3, sell at 4 → profit = 1
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Buy at 4, sell at 5 → profit = 1
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Total profit = 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 = 4
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">So the maximum profit is 4.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">This pattern is also known as the "Greedy approach", where we just sum all increasing pairs.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">React <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="❤️" draggable="false" class="b8 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="❤️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px 0px;"> if you got it right</strong></span></span><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">2:11 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">2:11 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_38FD18C88FFC9906C815377602E173B8"><div class="_anz0 _amkz message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd _amlv"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div aria-label="Poll from Python Programming 10:19 pm You are given an array of integers and a number k.

x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_D6B9BD477D999B88C8F3B7E2EEFC054E"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[8:00 am, 8/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">The correct answer is: A) 39</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">arr = [1, 4, 2, 10, 23, 3, 1, 0, 20]
</span><span class="x1lliihq">k = 4
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">We slide a window of size 4 through the array and calculate the sum for each window:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="1" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="1. ">[1, 4, 2, 10] → 1 + 4 + 2 + 10 = 17</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="2" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="2. ">[4, 2, 10, 23] → 4 + 2 + 10 + 23 = 39 ← Max so far</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="3" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="3. ">[2, 10, 23, 3] → 2 + 10 + 23 + 3 = 38</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="4" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="4. ">[10, 23, 3, 1] → 10 + 23 + 3 + 1 = 37</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="5" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="5. ">[23, 3, 1, 0] → 23 + 3 + 1 + 0 = 27</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="6" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="6. ">[3, 1, 0, 20] → 3 + 1 + 0 + 20 = 24</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">So the maximum sum of any subarray of size 4 is 39.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">This pattern helps avoid recomputing the full sum every time by subtracting the element that’s sliding out and adding the new one coming in — making it efficient for large arrays.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">React <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="❤️" draggable="false" class="b8 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="❤️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px 0px;"> if you got it right</strong></span></span><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">8:00 am</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">8:00 am</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_60E7B799895DE5DFE1F5847886849A9A"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[8:52 am, 8/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Now, let’s move to the next Interview Coding Pattern in the Python Learning Series:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">For those of you who recently joined this channel, you should first go through:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Python Learning Series: <a dir="auto" href="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527" title="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527</a>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Two Pointer Technique</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Why interviewers ask this?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The Two Pointer technique is very common in array and string problems, especially when you're trying to optimize for time complexity. It's often used in:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Sorted arrays</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Finding pairs/triplets with certain conditions</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Merging arrays</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">String manipulation problems</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">It shows the interviewer that you can write optimized solutions without brute force.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Use this technique when:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

data-darkreader-inline-fill="" style="--darkreader-inline-fill: currentColor;"></path></svg></span></div></div></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_B95800C2B975F790F47ABB632A6E13DA"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[2:21 pm, 8/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Correct Answer: A) [0, 1, 9, 16, 100]</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">You are given a sorted array, but it contains both negative and positive numbers.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">When you square these numbers, the order may no longer remain sorted.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">For example:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">arr = [-4, -1, 0, 3, 10]
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Their squares: [16, 1, 0, 9, 100] → not sorted.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">So we use the Two Pointer Technique to solve this efficiently.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Steps (Using Two Pointers):</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="1" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="1. ">Start with two pointers:</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">left at beginning (index 0)</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">right at end (index 4)</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="2" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="2. ">Create an empty result array of the same size. Fill it from the end to the start, placing the largest squares first.</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ol class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 xua7rxp x1gslohp x12nagc xqsn43r" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" value="3" class="xyiysdx"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="3. ">Compare the absolute values at left and right:</span></li>
</ol></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Square the bigger one.</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Place it at the current highest index in the result.</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Move the corresponding pointer.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Python Code Solution:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="">def sorted_…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">2:21 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">2:21 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_B6FE82AA8421AD6A030BC8DE2068067F"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[4:38 pm, 8/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Hi guys,

</span><span class="x1lliihq">For those of you who recently joined this channel, you should first go through:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Python Learning Series: <a dir="auto" href="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527" title="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1527</a>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Interview Coding Patterns: <a dir="auto" href="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1629" title="https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1629" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaiM08SDuMRaGKd9Wv0L/1629</a>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Prefix Sum Technique</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is Prefix Sum?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The prefix sum technique helps you precompute the cumulative sum of an array. This way, instead of summing over a subarray again and again, you can get the result in constant time (O(1)) using a simple formula.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Why Do Interviewers Ask This?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">To test if you can optimize brute-force solutions.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">It’s commonly used in subarray or range-based problems.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Helps check your understanding of hashmaps + arrays </span></li></ul>…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_CF281A157AAB8DB9F5FF09EC9FEF5C42"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[10:24 pm, 10/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Here's the A–Z list of essential Python programming concepts</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A - Arguments
</span><span class="x1lliihq">B - Built-in Functions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">C - Comprehensions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">D - Dictionaries
</span><span class="x1lliihq">E - Exceptions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">F - Functions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">G - Generators
</span><span class="x1lliihq">H - Higher-Order Functions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">I - Iterators
</span><span class="x1lliihq">J - Join Method
</span><span class="x1lliihq">K - Keyword Arguments
</span><span class="x1lliihq">L - Lambda Functions
</span><span class="x1lliihq">M - Modules
</span><span class="x1lliihq">N - NoneType
</span><span class="x1lliihq">O - Object-Oriented Programming
</span><span class="x1lliihq">P - PEP8
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Q - Queue
</span><span class="x1lliihq">R - Range Function
</span><span class="x1lliihq">S - Sets
</span><span class="x1lliihq">T - Tuples
</span><span class="x1lliihq">U - Unpacking
</span><span class="x1lliihq">V - Variables
</span><span class="x1lliihq">W - While Loop
</span><span class="x1lliihq">X - XOR Operation
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Y - Yield Keyword
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Z - Zip Function
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">These concepts are foundational to mastering Python and writing clean, efficient, and Pythonic code.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">React <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="❤️" draggable="false" class="b8 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="❤️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px 0px;"> for detailed explanation of each concept</strong></span></span><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s xk50ysn x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">10:24 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto"><span class="x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span>10:24 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">A - Arguments</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Inputs passed to a function. They can be:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Positional: based on order</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Keyword: specified by name</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Default: pre-defined if not passed</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Variable-length: *args, **kwargs for flexible input.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">B - Built-in Functions</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Predefined functions in Python like:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(), len(), type(), int(), input(), sum(), sorted(), etc.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">They simplify common tasks and are always available without import.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">C - Comprehensions</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Compact syntax for creating sequences:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">List: [x*x for x in range(5)]</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Set: {x*x for x in range(5)}</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Dict: {x: x*x for x in range(5)}</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Efficient and Pythonic way to process collections.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">D - Dictionaries</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Key-value data structures:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="">person = {"name": "Alice", "age…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">12:04 am</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">12:04 am</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; --lineHeight: 8.4609px; --8dd7yt: 0.0615em; --hxtmnb: -0.0615em;">16/5/2025</span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6"><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_3B9A01FB532DC553A80895B4FE1A647A"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[5:46 pm, 16/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Python Cheatsheet</strong> <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🐍" draggable="false" class="b35 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🐍" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px 0px;">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">This Cheatsheet covers the core Python concepts everyone should know.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">1. Basics</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print() – Outputs text to the screen.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Comments – Use # for single-line and triple quotes """ for multi-line comments.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print("Hello")  # This will print Hello
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">2. Variables &amp; Data Types</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Variables store values of different types like numbers, strings, booleans, lists, etc.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">x = 10           # Integer
</span><span class="x1lliihq">name = "Alice"   # String
</span><span class="x1lliihq">flag = True      # Boolean
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">3. Conditionals</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Used to make decisions in code using if, elif, and else.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">if x &gt; 0:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    print("Positive")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">else:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    print("Not positive")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">4. Loops</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">For loop: Iterates over a sequence.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">While loop: Repeats as long as a condition is true.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">for i in range(3):
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    print(i)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">5. Functions</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Variables &amp; Data Types (Build your own bio/profile script)</span></li>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Variables &amp; Data Types</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a variable?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Think of a variable as a label on a container that holds some data. You create a variable by giving it a name and putting a value inside.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">In Python, it looks like this:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">name = "Alex"
</span><span class="x1lliihq">age = 25
</span><span class="x1lliihq">height = 5.9
</span><span class="x1lliihq">is_student = True
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">name holds text (called a string) — notice the quotes!</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">age holds a whole number (integer)</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">height holds a decimal number (float)</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">is_student holds a True/False value (boolean)</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">You can check a variable’s type using type():
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(type(name))    # &lt;class 'str'&gt;
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(type(age))     # &lt;class 'int'&gt;
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Why use variables?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="">They let you store information so your program can remember it and use it later — like a player's scor…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s xk50ysn x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">11:39 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto"><span class="x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span>11:39 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> Answer: b) <a dir="auto" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt" style="cursor: pointer;">1010101010</a></strong>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. What is the type of the variable below?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">flag = True
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: c) bool</strong>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q4. Which data type is used to store decimal numbers in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: b) float</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="">float is used for numbers with decima…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">12:33 am</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">12:33 am</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_3BFD375DB44D387770531D17DC6F2697"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[12:03 pm, 27/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Now, let’s move on to next topic in the Python coding challenge.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Operators in Python</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Operators are special symbols or keywords that perform operations on variables and values.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Types of Operators in Python:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">1. Arithmetic Operators</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Used for basic math:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">+ (add), - (subtract), * (multiply), / (divide), // (floor divide), % (modulus), ** (power)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">a = 10
</span><span class="x1lliihq">b = 3
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(a + b)   # 13
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(a ** b)  # 1000
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">2. Comparison Operators</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Used to compare two values:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">==, !=, &gt;, &lt;, &gt;=, &lt;=
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">x = 5
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(x == 5)  # True
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(x != 3)  # True
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">3. Logical Operators</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Used to combine conditional statements:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">and, or, not
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">age = 20
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(age &gt; 18 and age &lt; 25)  # True
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">4. Assignment Operators</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Used to assign values to variables:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">=, +=, -=, *=, /=, etc.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">score = 10
</span><span class="">score += 5   #…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">12:03 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">12:03 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; </span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">1. What is the output of this code?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">x = 10
</span><span class="x1lliihq">y = 4
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(x % y)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: a) 2</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">% gives the remainder → 10 divided by 4 leaves 2.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">2. Which of these is a logical operator in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: b) or</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">and, or, not are logical operators.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">3. What does // do in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: c) Floor division (no decimal part)</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">// divides and rounds down to the nearest whole number.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">4. What is the result of this code?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">a = 5
</span><span class="x1lliihq">a += 3
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(a)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: a) 8</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">a += 3 is shorthand for a = a + 3.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">5. What will this return?</strong>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(3 &gt; 2 and 2 &gt; 5)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: b) False</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">3 &gt; 2 is True, 2 &gt; 5 is False → True and False = False

</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Strings &amp; String Methods</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A string is a sequence of characters inside quotes. You can use:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">name = "Alice"
</span><span class="x1lliihq">greeting = 'Hello!'
</span><span class="x1lliihq">paragraph = """This is
</span><span class="x1lliihq">a multiline string."""
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="👉" draggable="false" class="b38 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="👉" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -40px -60px;"> Strings are immutable — once created, they can't be changed directly.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✨" draggable="false" class="b7 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✨" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -40px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Common String Methods</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Here are some useful methods you’ll use all the time:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">lower() → makes everything lowercase
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">upper() → makes everything uppercase
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">strip() → removes spaces from start and end
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">replace("old", "new") → replaces parts of a string
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">split() → splits text into a list of words
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">count("word") → counts how many times something appears
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">find("word") → finds the position of a word
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">startswith("Hello") → checks how a string begins
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="">end…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s xk50ysn x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">4:36 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto"><span class="x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span>4:36 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div><div tabindex="-1" class="" role="row"><div tabindex="-1" class="_amjv _aotl" data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_F3EC4E48B57B323E5E0904EA9A11109A"><div class="_anz0 _amkz message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd _amlv"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div aria-label="Poll from Python Programming 11:56 pm What does this return?

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What is the output of the following code?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">msg = " Learn Python "
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(msg.strip())
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: b) "Learn Python"</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">strip() removes any whitespace from the beginning and end of the string — not in the middle.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. Which method is used to turn all characters in a string to uppercase?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: b) upper()</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The upper() method converts all lowercase characters in a string to uppercase.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. What is the result of this code?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">text = "Python Programming"
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(text.split())
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: a) ['Python', 'Programming']</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The default split() breaks the string at spaces, creating a list of words.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q4. Which of these strings is a palindrome?</strong>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Lists &amp; Tuples</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a List?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A list is a mutable (changeable) collection of items in a specific order.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Syntax:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">fruits = ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(fruits[0])    # Output: apple
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">fruits.append("mango")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(fruits)        # Output: ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry', 'mango']
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">You can add, remove, or update elements in a list.</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔸" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔸" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -60px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a Tuple?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A tuple is similar to a list, but it's immutable (unchangeable once defined).
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Syntax:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">colors = ("red", "green", "blue")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(colors[1])     # Output: green
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔒" draggable="false" class="b79 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔒" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> You cannot modify, append, or remove elements from a tuple after creation.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> Key Differences:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Mutability:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">List: Mutable — you can change, add, or remove elements </span></li></ul>…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s xk50ysn x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">12:04 am</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto"><span class="x2fvf9 xwklpps">Edited</span>12:04 am</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; xahtqtb"><span class=""></span><div class="_amk4 false _amkd"><div class="_amk6 _amlo"><span aria-label="Python Programming:"></span><div><div><div><div class="x9f619 x1hx0egp x1yuel0x x1yrsyyn xizg8k xu9hqtb xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[10:15 pm, 31/5/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Here are the Answers for the previous quizzes <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What will be the output of this code?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">fruits = ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(fruits[1])
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: banana</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Indexing starts at 0, so index 1 refers to the second item.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. Which of these defines a tuple correctly?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: (1, 2, 3)</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Tuples are defined using parentheses (). Lists use [], sets use {}.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. Which operation is not allowed on a tuple?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: Appending an item</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Tuples are immutable, meaning once created, you can't modify (add or remove) their elements.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q4. What is the main difference between a list and a tuple?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: Lists are mutable; tuples are immutable.</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">You can modify lists after creation, but tuples remain constant.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q5. What is the correct syntax for an empty list?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer</strong>…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">10:15 pm</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">10:15 pm</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"></div></div><div class="x78zum5 xbfrwjf x8k05lb xeq5yr9 x1n2onr6 xrr41r3 xqcrz7y"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="x141l45o x1h3r9g6 x1hx0egp x78zum5 x1q0g3np xl56j7k x18nleir" tabindex="-1"><div class="x1n2onr6 x9f619 x1rg5ohu x1okw0bk x193iq5w xjwt4uw x1izp4mc xqf7i6v xe6rjme xhslqc4 x2b8uid x1k43qru x1dymr41 x12ptayk x17h9p7f xjker3h x148chh3"><span dir="auto" class="x184q3qc xqxll94 x1s928wv xhkezso x1gmr53x x1cpjm7i x1fgarty x1943h6x x193iq5w xeuugli x13faqbe x1vvkbs x1lliihq x1fj9vlw xhslqc4 x1pg5gke xjb2p0i xfjzk2p xl2ypbo x1ic7a3i" style="--fontSize: 12px; </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Dictionaries &amp; Sets</strong> <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔑" draggable="false" class="b79 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔑" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -20px;"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧺" draggable="false" class="b138 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧺" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -60px;">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a Dictionary in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A dictionary is an unordered, mutable collection that stores data in key-value pairs.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧠" draggable="false" class="b137 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧠" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -60px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Example:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student = {
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    "name": "Amit",
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    "age": 21,
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    "course": "Python"
</span><span class="x1lliihq">}
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(student["name"])  # Output: Amit
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Keys must be unique and immutable (like strings, numbers).</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Values can be anything: strings, numbers, lists, or even other dictionaries.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧰" draggable="false" class="b138 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧰" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Common Dictionary Methods:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student.get("age")         # Returns 21
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student.keys()             # Returns all keys
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student.values()           # Returns all values
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student.items()            # Returns key-value pairs
</span><span class="x1lliihq">student["grade"] = "A+"    # Adds a new key-value pair
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
