</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Day 14: Mini Project – CLI To-Do List App</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="📋" draggable="false" class="b76 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="📋" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -40px;"> You’ll use everything you've learned so far: functions, input/output, lists, and error handling.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What You'll Build:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A simple Command-Line To-Do List where users can:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Add tasks</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">View tasks</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Remove tasks</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Exit the app safely</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🛠️" draggable="false" class="b99 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🛠️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -60px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Python Code:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">
todo_list = []

def show_menu():
    print("\nTo-Do List Options:")
    print("1. View Tasks")
    print("2. Add Task")
    print("3. Remove Task")
    print("4. Exit")

def view_tasks():
    if not todo_list:
        print("No tasks yet!")
    else:
        print("\nYour Tasks:")
        for idx, task in enumerate(todo_list, start=1):
            print(f"{idx}. {task}")

</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What happens if you try to remove a task using an invalid index?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The remove_task() function uses a try...except block that catches both ValueError (non-integer input) and IndexError (invalid index), and prints a friendly message instead of crashing.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. What is the purpose of the enumerate() function in this project?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. To get both index and task while displaying tasks</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">enumerate(todo_list, start=1) provides both the index and the task, which helps show numbered tasks to the user.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. Which of the following statements about the add_task() function is true?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[11:44 pm, 3/7/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Today, Let’s move on to the next topic in the Python Coding Challenge: <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="📁" draggable="false" class="b76 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="📁" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px 0px;"><img </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Day 15: Reading &amp; Writing Files in Python</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🤔" draggable="false" class="b101 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🤔" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Why Learn File Handling</strong> ?
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">It allows your Python programs to:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Save user data</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Read logs or configuration files</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Process data stored in .txt, .csv, etc.</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Opening a File</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">file = open("example.txt", "r")  # 'r' = read mode
</span><span class="x1lliihq">content = file.read()
</span><span class="x1lliihq">file.close()
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="⚠️" draggable="false" class="b4 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="⚠️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -60px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Always close the file after opening — or use the safer with keyword</strong> .
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Using "with" (Best Practice)</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">with open("example.txt", "r") as file:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    content = file.read()
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    print(content)
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Using "with", the file closes automatically after use.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✍️" draggable="false" class="b7 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✍️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -40px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Writing to a File</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">with open("data.txt", "w") as file:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    file.write("Hello, Python!")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">'w' mode overwrites the file</span></li>

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What does the "r" mode do in the open() function?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: B. Reads from the file</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">"r" stands for read mode. It opens the file for reading. If the file does not exist, it raises an error.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. Which of the following is the correct and safest way to open a file in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. with open("myfile.txt", "r") as file:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Using with ensures the file is automatically closed after reading, even if an error occurs.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. What happens if the file doesn’t exist and you open it in "r" mode?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> Answer: D. It raises a FileNotFoundError
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Explanation:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Read mode ("r") does not create a new file. If the file is missing, Python throws a FileNotFoundError.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q4. What does "a" mode do?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Today, Let’s move on to the next topic in the Python Coding Challenge: <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="📁" draggable="false" class="b76 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Creating &amp; Using Custom Modules</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🤔" draggable="false" class="b101 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🤔" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a Module?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A module is just a <code class="xjwep3j x1t39747 x1wcsgtt x1pczhz8 x1bu39yj x1bvqhpb x135b78x x11lfxj5 x1nn3v0j x1120s5i _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="`${appText}`">.py</code> file containing functions, variables, or classes you can reuse across other files.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Why Use Modules?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="* ">Reuse code  </span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="* ">Keep things organized  </span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="* ">Avoid repetition  </span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="* ">Easier to debug and collaborate  </span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="📁" draggable="false" class="b76 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="📁" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px 0px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Example: Create a Custom Module</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🗂️" draggable="false" class="b84 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🗂️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -80px;"> <code class="xjwep3j x1t39747 x1wcsgtt x1pczhz8 x1bu39yj x1bvqhpb x135b78x x11lfxj5 x1nn3v0j x1120s5i _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="`${appText}`"><a dir="auto" href="http://mymath.py" title="http://mymath.py" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">mymath.py</a></code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

def square(x):
    return x ** 2
</code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🗂️" draggable="false" class="b84 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🗂️" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -80px;"> <code class="xjwep3j x1t39747 x1wcsgtt x1pczhz8 x1bu39yj x1bvqhpb x135b78x x11lfxj5 x1nn3v0j x1120s5i _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="`${appText}`"><a dir="auto" href="http://main.py" title="http://main.py" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">main.py</a></code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">python
import mymath

print(mymath.add(2, 3))      # Output: 5
print(mymath.square(4))      # Output: 16
</code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧠" draggable="false" class="b137 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧠" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -60px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Using <code class="xjwep3j x1t39747 x1wcsgtt x1pczhz8 x1bu39yj x1bvqhpb x135b78x x11lfxj5 x1nn3v0j x1120s5i _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="`${appText}`">from</code> Keyword:</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">python
from mymath import add

print(add(10, 5))
</code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What is a Python module?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. A .py file containing functions, variables, or classes</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A Python module is simply any file that ends with .py. You can import its contents into other Python scripts.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. How do you import a custom module named <a dir="auto" href="http://tools.py?" title="http://tools.py?" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">tools.py?</a></strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. import tools</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">To use a custom module, just use import tools (assuming <a dir="auto" href="http://tools.py" title="http://tools.py" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">tools.py</a> is in the same directory or your Python path).
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. What will this code print?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"># <a dir="auto" href="http://helpers.py" title="http://helpers.py" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">helpers.py</a>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">def greet():
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    return "Hello!"
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"># <a dir="auto" href="http://main.py" title="http://main.py" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">main.py</a>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">import helpers
</span><span class="x1lliihq">print(helpers.greet())
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: A. Hello!</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">You’re calling greet() from the helpers module using dot notation, so it prints "Hello!".
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q4. What is the advantage of using from module import func?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Today, Let’s move on to the next topic in the Python Coding Challenge: <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="📝" draggable="false" class="b77 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="📝" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px 0px;"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧱" draggable="false" class="b138 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧱" tabindex="-1" </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Classes &amp; Objects in Python</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Object-Oriented Programming helps you:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Model real-world entities</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Group data + behavior together</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Write clean, scalable, and reusable code</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is a Class?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A class is a blueprint for creating objects (instances).
</span><span class="x1lliihq">It defines attributes (variables) and methods (functions).
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">
class Person:
    def __init__(self, name, age):     # Constructor
        <a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a> = name               # Attribute
        self.age = age

    def greet(self):                   # Method
        print(f"Hello, I'm {<a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a>} and I'm {self.age} years old.")</code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is an Object?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">An object is an instance of a class.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">p1 = Person("Alice", 25)
p1.greet()
# Output: Hell</code>…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s xk50ysn x2fvf9 </span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q1. What is a class in Python?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. A blueprint for creating objects</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">A class defines a structure — including attributes and methods — that can be used to create multiple objects.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q2. What is the purpose of the <em class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="_${appText}_">_init</em>_ method in a class?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Answer: C. It initializes object properties when an object is created</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">The <em class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="_${appText}_">_init</em>_ method is the constructor. It's automatically called when a new object is created and is used to initialize its data.
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Q3. What will this code output?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">class Dog:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    def <em class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="_${appText}_">_init</em>_(self, name):
</span><span class="x1lliihq">        <a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a> = name
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">    def bark(self):
</span><span class="x1lliihq">        print(f"{<a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a>} says woof!")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">d = Dog("Buddy")
</span><span class="x1lliihq">d.bark()
</span><span class="x1lliihq">

Buddy says woof!</strong>

data-id="false_120363310706406515@newsletter_C46C4373EBEF0A2499A094A5BDD9DF33"><div class="_anz0 message-in focusable-list-item _amjy _amjz _amj- _as4s _amjw x1klvx2g xahtqtb"><span xwib8y2"><div class="copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="[8:41 am, 14/7/2025] Python Programming: "><div class="_akbu"><span dir="ltr" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" style="min-height: 0px;"><span class="x1lliihq">Today, Let’s move on to the next topic in the Python Coding Challenge: <img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🧬" draggable="false" class="b138 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🧬" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -40px 0px;"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✨" draggable="false" class="b7 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✨" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -40px;">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🔹" draggable="false" class="b80 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🔹" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: 0px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Inheritance &amp; Polymorphism</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🤔" draggable="false" class="b101 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🤔" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -80px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">What is Inheritance?</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">Inheritance lets you create a new class (child) that reuses code from an existing class (parent).
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">This means:
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><ul class="x13faqbe xeaf4i8 x1n2onr6 x1gslohp x12nagc x13fj5qh" dir="ltr"><li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Less repetition</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Better code organization</span></li>
<li dir="auto" class="x1g0dm76 x1jieuv1 xo7wnuk x1gznph8 x1rkpvhg xlu7um4 xm78dhd x1r4uxqn"><span class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-pre-plain-text="- ">Easy extensions to functionality</span></li>
</ul></span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="✅" draggable="false" class="b6 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="✅" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -20px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Basic Inheritance Example</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">class Animal:
    def __init__(self, name):
        <a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a> = name

    def speak(self):
        print(f"{<a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a>} makes a sound.")

class Dog(Animal):  # Dog inherits from Animal
    def speak(self):
        print(f"{<a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a>} says Woof!")

class Cat(Animal):
    def speak(self):
        print(f"{<a dir="auto" href="http://self.name" title="http://self.name" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text x1bvjpef x1lku1pv x11iimpl xbvygy2 x1wp9yj1 x1e2wovf x1ph7ams x17f7hit x1k74hu9 xn69kzl xrys4gj xhmieyt">self.name</a>} says Meow!")</code>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class="x1lliihq"><img crossorigin="anonymous" alt="🐶" draggable="false" class="b36 emoji apple  _ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-plain-text="🐶" tabindex="-1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" style="background-position: -20px -80px;"> <strong class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="*${appText}*">Using the Subclasses</strong>
</span><span class="x1lliihq">
</span><span class=""><code class="_ao3e selectable-text copyable-text" data-app-text-template="```${appText}```">d = Dog("Bruno")
c = Cat("Luna")

d.speak()  # Bruno says</code>…</span></span><div role="button" tabindex="0" class="xuxw1ft x1ypdohk x1rg5ohu xo1mcw5 x1xlr1w8 x1hl2dhg xt0b8zv xbvygy2 x17f7hit xp30eni xhmieyt read-more-button"> Read more</div><span class=""><span class="x3nfvp2 xxymvpz xlshs6z xqtp20y xexx8yu x11lfxj5 x18d9i69 x135b78x x12lo8hy x152skdk" aria-hidden="true"><span class="x1c4vz4f x2lah0s">8:41 am</span></span></span></div></div><div class="x1n2onr6 x1n327nk x18mqm2i xhsvlbd x14z9mp xz62fqu xdwrcjd"><div class="x13yyeie xx3o462 xuxw1ft x78zum5 x6s0dn4 x12lo8hy x152skdk"><span class="x1rg5ohu x16dsc37" dir="auto">8:41 am</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><span class=""></span><div class="_amlr"></div></div><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 x78zum5 xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xeuugli x2lwn1j x1nhvcw1 x1q0g3np x6s0dn4 _amj_"><div class="x1c4vz4f xs83m0k xdl72j9 x1g77sc7 xeuugli x2lwn1j xozqiw3 x1oa3qoh x12fk4p8 xexx8yu x1im30kd x18d9i69
